plan_metadata.name: Sample Msgext Search Python Local Debug

steps.description: Click the search input field in the "Samples" tab of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit within Visual Studio Code, where users can enter text to filter sample projects.

parameters.text: Teams Messaging Extensions Search using Python

steps.description: Type text "Teams Messaging Extensions Search using Python" into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code, just below the "Featured samples" heading.

Click the "Create" button next to "Teams Messaging Extension" in the Samples tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:search-extension-settings}} into the run time variable.
